name: Tangy Blue Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the dried chives if the fresh is not available, otherwise omit.
2. Blend the blue cheese and sour cream thoroughly.
3. Add all the other ingredients to the blender and blend well.
4. Cover and chill.
Makes about 2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Carrots, Cherry Tomatoes, Pineapple, Apple, Pear, Cocktail Bread, Italian or French Bread Chunks
